course.title: Foundation in Digital Logic
course.description: An introductory course covering the absolute basics of computational thinking, binary logic, and basic scripting.

course.title: BSc in Software Engineering
course.description: Comprehensive study of advanced algorithms, data structures, and secure application development.
course.entry_requirements: Foundation Degree in CS or equivalent

course.title: MSc in Cybernetics & Artificial Intelligence
course.description: Research-focused program exploring machine learning models, predictive algorithms, and advanced cybersecurity.

course.title: Foundation in Global Studies
course.description: Introduction to world history, basic diplomacy, and the geopolitical landscape of Ostania and Westalis.

course.title: BA in Intelligence Analysis
course.description: Master the art of information gathering, cryptography, and maintaining regional stability through covert observation.

course.title: MA in Psychological Operations
course.description: High-clearance study of psychological warfare, deep-cover diplomacy, and advanced counterterrorism strategies.
course.entry_requirements: Bachelor's Degree in Intelligence or related field

course.title: Foundation in Classical Arts
course.department: Faculty of Classical Arts & Cultural Refinement
course.description: A refined introduction to classical music theory, basic sketching, and the history of art.

course.title: BFA in Renaissance Art History
course.department: Faculty of Classical Arts & Cultural Refinement
course.description: Deep dive into the aesthetics, techniques, and cultural impacts of historical masterpieces and sculptures.

course.title: MFA in Artistic Diplomacy
course.department: Faculty of Classical Arts & Cultural Refinement
course.description: An elite program combining fine arts curation with cultural diplomacy, ensuring the prestige of Eden Academy worldwide.
